reviews.comment:
Cuando pedís un auxilio te dicen que los que manejan son mecánicos y la realidad que después no tocan nada porque es un riesgo que quede mal arreglado y que los puedas demandar. Lo único que tienen es el servicio de grúas y por eso pagas $ 1800 por mes

(Translated by Google)
When you call for roadside assistance, they tell you the drivers are mechanics, but the truth is they don't actually touch anything because it's a risk they'll do a bad job and you could sue them. All they offer is a towing service, and that's why you pay $1800 a month.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/11887773088728540195/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURrM29mLWRnEAE
